results.title: SOCOM wants to revive legacy M4 carbine with ‘hypervelocity’ cartridge
results.summary: The elite command asked vendors to double the effective range of the M4 platform with the Hypervelocity Improved Carbine program.

results.title: US Navy selects companies for at-sea MUSV prototype testing
results.summary: The U.S. Navy announced on Friday that it had selected seven companies to compete to secure the service’s Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel contract.
